name: homeclaw-docs
description: Scripts for building docs (e.g. Mermaid diagram export)

scripts.diagrams: mkdir -p assets && mmdc -i diagrams/system-overview.mmd -o assets/system-overview.svg && mmdc -i diagrams/data-flow.mmd -o assets/data-flow.svg && mmdc -i diagrams/model-roles-overview.mmd -o assets/model-roles-overview.svg && mmdc -i diagrams/model-selection-decision.mmd -o assets/model-selection-decision.svg && mmdc -i diagrams/model-lifecycle-planned.mmd -o assets/model-lifecycle-planned.svg
